Interface UserRelationshipREPO

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<UserRelationshipTBL, Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<UserRelationshipTBL, Integer>
public interface UserRelationshipREPO extends org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<UserRelationshipTBL, Integer>
Spring Data JPA repository for UserRelationshipTBL entities.

This repository provides CRUD operations and custom queries for user relationship records.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<UserRelationshipTBL>
    findByReceiveridAndTypeAndStatus(UserLoginTBL sender, int type, int status)
    Finds relationship records by receiver, type, and status.
    List<UserRelationshipTBL>
    findBySenderidAndReceiverid(UserLoginTBL sender, UserLoginTBL receiver)
    Finds relationship records by sender and receiver.
    List<UserRelationshipTBL>
    findBySenderidAndReceiveridAndType(UserLoginTBL sender, UserLoginTBL reciever, int type)
    Finds relationship records by sender, receiver, and type.
    List<UserRelationshipTBL>
    findBySenderidAndReceiveridAndTypeAndStatus(UserLoginTBL sender, UserLoginTBL reciever, int type, int status)
    Finds relationship records by sender, receiver, type, and status.
    List<UserRelationshipTBL>
    findBySenderOrReceiverAndStatusAndType(UserLoginTBL senderId, UserLoginTBL receiverId, int status, int type)
    Finds relationship records where user is either sender or receiver, with matching status and type.

    Methods inherited from interface org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository

    count, delete, deleteAll, deleteAll, deleteAllById, deleteById, existsById, findAll, findAllById, findById, save, saveAll

  • Method Details

    • findBySenderidAndReceiveridAndTypeAndStatus

      List<UserRelationshipTBL> findBySenderidAndReceiveridAndTypeAndStatus(UserLoginTBL sender, UserLoginTBL reciever, int type, int status)
      Finds relationship records by sender, receiver, type, and status.
      Parameters:
      sender - the user who initiated the relationship
      reciever - the user who received the relationship
      type - the relationship type to match
      status - the status to match
      Returns:
      list of matching relationship records

    • findBySenderidAndReceiveridAndType

      List<UserRelationshipTBL> findBySenderidAndReceiveridAndType(UserLoginTBL sender, UserLoginTBL reciever, int type)
      Finds relationship records by sender, receiver, and type.
      Parameters:
      sender - the user who initiated the relationship
      reciever - the user who received the relationship
      type - the relationship type to match
      Returns:
      list of matching relationship records

    • findBySenderidAndReceiverid

      List<UserRelationshipTBL> findBySenderidAndReceiverid(UserLoginTBL sender, UserLoginTBL receiver)
      Finds relationship records by sender and receiver.
      Parameters:
      sender - the user who initiated the relationship
      receiver - the user who received the relationship
      Returns:
      list of matching relationship records

    • findByReceiveridAndTypeAndStatus

      List<UserRelationshipTBL> findByReceiveridAndTypeAndStatus(UserLoginTBL sender, int type, int status)
      Finds relationship records by receiver, type, and status.
      Parameters:
      sender - the user to search for (as receiver)
      type - the relationship type to match
      status - the status to match
      Returns:
      list of matching relationship records

    • findBySenderOrReceiverAndStatusAndType

      @Query("SELECT u FROM UserRelationshipTBL u WHERE (u.senderid = :senderId OR u.receiverid = :receiverId) AND u.status = :status AND u.type = :type") List<UserRelationshipTBL> findBySenderOrReceiverAndStatusAndType(@Param("senderId") UserLoginTBL senderId, @Param("receiverId") UserLoginTBL receiverId, @Param("status") int status, @Param("type") int type)
      Finds relationship records where user is either sender or receiver, with matching status and type.
      Parameters:
      senderId - the user ID to match as sender
      receiverId - the user ID to match as receiver
      status - the status to match
      type - the relationship type to match
      Returns:
      list of matching relationship records
